dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Map of EchoJS platform modules and session status.

reactivity.title: Reactivity
reactivity.description: signal, computed, batch, effect, scope/cleanup and hyperdom integration.

forms.title: Forms
forms.description: Fields, Zod schemas, submit and wireFormModel.

formsNested.title: Nested forms
formsNested.description: Dynamic field arrays and nested catalog structures.

state.title: State
state.description: Store, derived values and typed actions.

persistence.title: Persistence
persistence.description: Storage adapters, hydrate and persist for form fields.

query.title: Query
query.description: Cache, fetch, retry and mutations on JSONPlaceholder API.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Product scenario: users, sprints, catalog and guards.

account.title: Account
account.description: Profile, mock session and personal settings.

dashboard.heroBody: Interactive app to explore the EchoJS ecosystem. Each section is working functionality, not an isolated snippet: forms persist, session survives reload, workspace behaves like a product.
dashboard.loggedInAs: Signed in as {email}. Token in cookie, profile in localStorage.
dashboard.loginHint: Sign in to open account and protected workspace sections.

auth.layoutDesc: Sign in to EchoJS Lab — mock API, persist in cookie/localStorage.
auth.loginHint: Route /auth/login — mock API, token in cookie.
auth.emailDraftHint: Email draft is saved in localStorage.
auth.signupHint: Route /auth/signup — after submit mock login and redirect to login.
auth.layoutLead: Sign in to EchoJS Lab. Session persists via @echojs/persist (cookie + localStorage).

account.profileHint: Fields and phone array are saved to localStorage automatically.
account.guestHint: Available after sign in — mock auth with persist.

state.hint: Local lab UI state. For app session see Account.

persistence.intro: What is implemented in the app
persistence.fieldItem: — email/remember on login, profile fields on
persistence.hint: Package @echojs/persist connects via .extend() — store and form primitives don't know browser APIs.

signal.title: signal — basic state
signal.hint: signal(initial), .set(), .update(), reactive DOM via getter functions.

batch.title: batch — grouped updates
batch.hint: batch() merges multiple .set/.update into one reactive transaction.

todos.title: array + List — todo list
todos.hint: Array in signal + hyperdom List() for efficient rendering.

peek.title: peek vs value
peek.hint: peek() reads without subscribing — peek effect won't re-run.

readonly.title: readonly — read only
readonly.hint: readonly(signal) for external read without mutation.

clock.title: scope + cleanup — timer
clock.hint: scope/effect/cleanup: interval starts and clears on toggle.

cart.title: computed cart — integration
cart.hint: Mini-store pattern: signal + computed total, like e-commerce UI.

model.title: hyperdom + createModel
model.hint: createModel() creates VM once; Show/List/cx react to signals.

reactivityLab.modelNote1: This page uses createReactivityLabModel() and ReactivityLabView.
reactivityLab.modelNote2: Compare with @echojs/store on State and @echojs/query — signals inside query instances.

queryDemo.apiHint: Public API: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com — fake REST backend (data is not persisted).
queryDemo.infiniteHint: Posts load in pages of 3 via fetchNextPage(). JSONPlaceholder: _start / _limit.
queryDemo.mutationHint: After createMutation.run() posts cache is invalidated and refetched.
queryDemo.playgroundHint: Scenarios for createQuery, createInfiniteQuery, createMutation and AbortController.

slow.title: Slow query (~4s)
slow.hint: Delay before fetch — try Abort in time.

manual.title: Manual AbortController
manual.hint: user.refetch({ abortController }) — your controller for one refetch.

route.title: External signal (route)
route.hint: Instance with { signal: routeAc.signal } — abort on route leave.

cache.title: enabled + cache
cache.hint: enabled: false stops fetch. Client cache API.

mutation.title: Slow mutation (~5s)
mutation.hint: Long POST — cancel / abort while pending.

home.hint: Use the workspace sidebar on the right → for product scenarios.
home.usersDesc: List, detail with query tab, replace without reloading layout.

settings.title: Settings
settings.guardHint: Access via guardRoute — signed-in users only.

lazy.title: Lazy route (code split)
lazy.hint: This view loads via createLazyRouteView + dynamic import.
lazy.cacheHint: Revisiting does not reload the chunk — module is cached.

sprint.summary: Sprint summary — nested layouts + query tab

miniForms.intro: More @echojs/form examples: checkbox, select, textarea, field array.

nestedCatalog.intro: Nested arrays + select/textarea + wireFormModel for catalog.
